E-Ink

Onyx Note Pro

$549 - $599 • In stock

The Onyx Note Pro blends a sharp 10.3-inch Carta display with advanced note-taking tools and a sleek metal chassis. It’s ideal for readers and creatives who want a premium paper-like workflow without glare.
